title: ProDec 8" Carbon Steel Taping Knife for Taping and Filling Plasterboard/Drywall
features: 8" (200mm) taping knife used to tape and fill plasterboard/drywall for a smooth, professional finish
SK7 heat treated high carbon blue steel blade that is lacquered to prevent rusting
Strong yet lightweight aluminium bridge riveted to ergonomic soft grip handle
Also ideal for smoothing vinyl stickers and decals onto flat surfaces
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Taping knives - for professional grade smoothing A taping knife is an essential tool for use with plasterboard/drywall, for both joining boards together during installation and filling seams or holes for spot repairs. The blade is made from SK7 high carbon steel that is heat treated for strength, giving the characteristic blue colour, and lacquered to prevent rusting. It has a laser-straight edge that makes it ideal for smoothing plasterboard jointing/scrim tape down to give the lowest possible profile for a seamless appearance when plastered, as well as filling seams and holes for an ultra-smooth, professional finish. The product is also ideal for smoothing vinyl stickers and decals onto flat surfaces, with the straight edge chasing out air bubbles whilst not damaging the material. The blade is attached to a strong yet lightweight aluminium bridge and securely crimped along its length to hold it in place. The bridge is in turn riveted to a rugged handle with two heavy duty 20mm rivets. The handle is ergonomically shaped with soft grip for comfort and reduced hand fatigue, especially during extended use, with a hanging hole for storage. Solutions for applying fillers and sealants from ProDec Fillers, sealants and caulk are essential to getting your surface perfectly smooth ready for painting or papering. Whether you're applying or smoothing, filling deep holes, hairline cracks, long joins between plasterboard panels and more, ProDec has a range of tools to help you get your surface in tiptop condition. Rosewood filling knives A flexible stainless steel blade with full tang that extends all the way through the handle and prevents it snapping at the join of handle and blade, giving it a much longer lifetime than half tang and DIY scrapers. Mounted onto a premium quality varnished handle made from durable rosewood. Available in 1", 2", 3" and 4" sizes. Duragrip filling knives A flexible stainless steel blade with full tang mounted onto ProDec's premium quality Duragrip soft grip handle that is ergonomically shaped for reduced hand fatigue. It also has a solid steel hammer end which is useful for quickly and efficiently hammering nails, tacks, wall plugs, etc. Available in 1.25", 2", 3" and 4" sizes. Filling blades A deep, thin and flexible steel blade mounted onto a short, full width plastic handle which gives close control with general purpose and fine surface fillers on walls, ceilings and woodwork. Available in a pack of 4 mixed sizes containing 2", 3", 4" and 5" widths. Caulkers With a flexible plastic blade that has a wider profile than standard filling knives, caulkers enable you to fill gaps of many shapes and sizes quickly and efficiently. They are particularly useful where long joins require sealing, such as marrying plasterboards together. Available in 8", 10" and 12" sizes. Taping knives A high carbon steel blade, heat treated for strength. It has a laser-straight edge that makes it ideal for smoothing plasterboard jointing tape down to give the lowest possible profile for a seamless appearance when plastered, as well as filling seams and holes for an ultra-smooth, professional finish. Available in 6", 8", 10" and 12" sizes. Skeleton caulking guns Trade quality guns for applying cartridge-based sealants, caulk and fillers, featuring a powerful trigger, robust plunger and a release clip to give a clean break in the sealant bead, ensuring no long, messy strings. Available in standard format plus a reinforced model that is especially ideal for higher viscosity sealants. Revolving caulking gun Refines the classic skeleton design to the next level, for trade quality, ultra-smooth application of cartridge-based sealants, caulk and fillers. The reinforced barrel not only gives heavy duty performance, it can be rotated during application to give a continuous smooth bead around corners and in awkward areas. Foil sausage guns Robust, full metal barrel construction ensuring no mess when used with foil-based sealants, caulk and fillers and also compatible with traditional cartridges. Features powerful plunger and powdered coated trigger with quick release clip for precise control to stop the flow when required. Available in 400ml and 600ml versions.
